Package org.eventb.internal.core

Class Util

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.Util
public class Util extends Object
This class contains miscellaneous static utility methods.

  • Method Details

    • log

      public static void log(Throwable e, String message)
      Logs an internal plug-in error to the platform log, with the given exception and message
      Parameters:
      e - exception to report (may be null)
      message - message giving context of the reported error

    • newCoreException

      public static org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException newCoreException(String message, Object... args)
      Creates a new core exception for this plug-in with the given message and message arguments.
      Parameters:
      message - a human-readable message, localized to the current locale. Should be one of the messages defined in the Messages class
      args - parameters to bind with the message
      See Also:
      • newCoreException(String)

    • newCoreException

      public static org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException newCoreException(String message)
      Creates a new core exception for this plugin, with the given parameters.

      The severity of the status associated to this exception is ERROR. The plugin specific code is OK. No nested exception is stored in the status.

      Parameters:
      message - a human-readable message, localized to the current locale. Should be one of the messages defined in the Messages class

    • newCoreException

      public static org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException newCoreException(String message, Throwable exception)
      Creates a new core exception for this plugin, with the given parameters.

      The severity of the status associated to this exception is ERROR. The plugin specific code is OK.

      Parameters:
      message - a human-readable message, localized to the current locale. Should be one of the messages defined in the Messages class
      exception - a low-level exception, or null if not applicable

    • addExtensionDependencies

      public static void addExtensionDependencies(IGraph graph, IEventBRoot target) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • newRodinDBException

      public static RodinDBException newRodinDBException(String message, Throwable exception)
      Creates a new RodinDB exception for this plugin, with the given parameters.

      The severity of the status associated to this exception is ERROR. The plugin specific code is OK.

      Parameters:
      message - a human-readable message, localized to the current locale. Should be one of the messages defined in the Messages class
      exception - a low-level exception, or null if not applicable
